case_title: ORRICO, KATHLEEN VS PIGEON, WILLIAM (PHARMACY ADMINISTRATION) et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-26-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-07-2004 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR DEFENDANT TO INVESTIGATE PLAINTIFF'S CONCERNS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ORRICO, KATHLEEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PIGEON, WILLIAM (PHARMACY ADMINISTRATION) KAISER FOUNDATION HOSPITAL, INC. $1,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,282.00, KAISER FOUNDATION HOSPITAL, INC. ADDED AS DEFENDANT PER STIPULATION OF PARTIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT PIGEON, WILLIAM (PHARMACY ADMINISTRATION) KAISER FOUNDATION HOSPITAL, INC.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ORRICO, KATHLEEN AS TO DEFENDANT PIGEON, WILLIAM (PHARMACY ADMINISTRATION) KAISER FOUNDATION HOSPITAL, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-26-2004 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
